title: Digimobs Official Modpack
description: A pack designed around the Digimobs mod. Primarily for some performance improvements and other occasional add ons.
body:
A modpack for the Digimobs mod. This modpack is currently built around performance as Digimobs can be quite resource intensive. The pack adds the following mods:

Digimobs
AI Improvements
Canary
Clumps
Default Options + Balm(Dependency)
Entity Culling
Ferrite Core
Memory Leak Fix
Rubidium
Starlight
